name: 14.7 fl oz Earthenware Mug - Spritz™
description:
Sip your favorite drinks in style with the 14.7 fl oz Earthenware Mug from Spritz™. Crafted from durable stoneware, its dog-themed design and crisp finish make it a delightful choice for your drinkware collection. The mug comfortably holds up to 14.7 ounces, perfect for keeping your beverages warm or cool, whether you're starting your morning or taking a moment to unwind.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
